ogTitle: Caffreys Flat vs Cairncross: Climate Safety

heading: Caffreys Flat vs Cairncross — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caffreys Flat, New South Wales and Cairncross, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cairncross has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Caffreys Flat (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caffreys Flat or Cairncross safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caffreys Flat has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Cairncross scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caffreys Flat scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Cairncross scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caffreys Flat or Cairncross?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cairncross has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
